notes: All shared abilities, compliance-controls-and-governance abilities, and transportation-and-logistics abilities are declared and mapped to one or more passing scenario IDs.
Every scenario in evaluation/results.json is represented in scenario_coverage.
Coverage emphasizes missing evidence, chain-of-custody breaks, route disruption, safety and clearance escalation, unauthorized signoff refusal, adjacent-lane routing, and tenant-specific adaptation.
